p":1706718683,"group_id":"7256761588416252939","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0XQX8hVJ5CMGRZPkFQb9z+Qu9rheFzy8XqNd37We51X","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2208256140780279","user_name":"幽燕山庄的耶律齐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2208256140780279","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1706972085,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7256761588416252939","book_info":{"abstract":"种田文+日常休闲+家长里短+搞笑+基建+钓鱼+无女主（专注事业），慢节奏，低开高走，放心入。
北漂三年的李凡，会所酒后意外获得一个钓场系统，回到老家李岗村，挖鱼塘，开钓场。
李凡一步一步，从一口小鱼塘做起，慢慢发展。
随着钓场越来越大，李凡从老一辈人手中接过李岗村的大旗，带着李岗村的村民们发家致富，更是让李岗村成为全国钓鱼佬心目中的钓鱼圣地。
百斤大青，巨骨舌鱼，湄公河巨鲶，百斤鳄雀鳝，巨暹罗鲤.....
